name: ipsecAssociationDatabaseUpdate
title: ipsecAssociationDatabaseUpdate
description: With this function it is possible to update an existing security association in the security association database of the current network stack. This is necessary after modifying a security association record with ipsecAssociationSetParameter.

parameters.name: association
parameters.description: Handle to an security association record object.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
